user.title: Multiroom Climate
user.description: Regulate your home to a weighted average of room sensors by wrapping an existing thermostat.

data_description.climate_entity: The thermostat this controller will drive (kept in its AUTO band).
data_description.target_sensors: The room sensors whose weighted average is the temperature to hold.

abort.already_configured: This thermostat is already controlled by a Multiroom Climate entry.
